title: Singapore's Finamatrix Tokenizes Crude Algae Oil With Leading Algae Cultivation Technologies: Global Access to Green Gold
text: SINGAPORE--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Finamatrix, the #1 NAS100 risk-tech database, has tokenized Crude Algae Oil (CAO) for global access to tackle climate change. Utilizing its proprietary database algorithms to aggregate CAO prices partnering with the leading algae cultivation technologies including A-MAP (the first algae cultivation certified by the ISCC) that produces low-cost CAO.
